full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #71 (2026-06-23)

PULSE
Health: 0.5615 (C). 1058 wallets, 317 contributors. 94 memos today vs 217 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
141 reward payments, 390971 PFT distributed to 28 contributors. Top earner: r4RPpe...WghS (96250 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued today totaling 15,000 PFT. Highest: rGu432...Dcw9 (15,000 PFT). Lowest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (0 PFT). 7-day leader: rGu432...Dcw9 (15,000 PFT, avg 15,000/day over 1 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): raUWC4...TbsW (149 memos). Fastest new contributor: rHR5WT...E16F (6.0 memos/day in 3 days). 5 new wallet(s) this week. 93 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-24): 94 transactions from 13 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
